title: Fishing Net
description: This mod adds a Fishing Net to help you with fishing.
body:
Hi! This mod adds a Fishing Net to help you with fishing with simple interface and a good texture

To use the block, it must be placed underwater. After placing the block, right-click on it to open the menu.
![IMAGE OF THE MENU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed25f92a6e940e5fd79194234a8ee30bd689abf.png)
After opening the menu, you will need to click on the start button. Then, you will wait between 5 and 7 seconds, and between 1 and 10 salmon will be stored in the block's storage.
![image after saumon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6726a72fbde1b42ba4321037cf2ee6ec44826a6.png)
##  Warning: You need to keep the menu open and click the start button again for the fish to appear in the block's storage.
